conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical conditions of polymer adsorption in the liquid chromatography
conditions.detector: Diode-Array-Detector (type UVD 3205, Gynkotek, Germering, Germany) and a UV-detector (type SPD-10A, Shimadzu Europa GmbH, Duisburg, Germany)
conditions.evidence_text: The ‘critical’ conditions for poly-L-lactide were realised by a mixture of 60vol.% dioxane and 40vol.% n-hexane which was used as solvent and mobile phase. A Nucleosil 300-S column (250mm 4mm ID, Macharey-Nagel, Diuren, Germany) was used. The column was thermostated at 30°C.
conditions.corresponding_author_name: O. Wachsen; K. H. Reichert; R. P. Krüger; H. Much; G. Schulz
conditions.physical_address: Technical University of Berlin, Institute of Technical Chemistry, Sekr. TC 3, Str. d. 17. Juni 135, D-10623 Berlin, Germany; Institute of Applied Chemistry, Berlin-Adlershof e. V. (ACA), Rudower Chaussee 5, D-12484 Berlin, Germany
